zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD报价8.8207，24小时微跌0.24%，价格运行于日内区间8.7901至8.8414之间。整体来看，币价仍位于20日均线8.9157下方，显示短期趋势偏弱，市场多头动能暂未形成有效突破。

从技术指标观察，MACD值为-0.0234，处于零轴下方，反映空头力量仍占据一定优势。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格结构判断，市场处于弱势整理阶段，短线存在反复震荡的可能，趋势方向尚不明朗。

关键支撑位关注8.7900附近，该位置为当前日内低点区域，若失守可能进一步测试8.7000一线。上方阻力首先关注8.8400至8.9200区间，其中20日均线附近构成重要压力，突破后有望改善短期技术形态。

交易策略方面，稳健投资者可等待价格有效站稳20日均线后再考虑顺势做多。激进交易者则可依托8.7900支撑进行短线低吸，但需严格设置止损。整体而言，当前市场偏空震荡，操作上宜控制仓位并关注突破信号。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 8.8207, remaining under its 20-period simple moving average at 8.9157, which suggests the short-term trend continues to lean bearish. The modest 24-hour decline of 0.24% reflects limited selling pressure, but the inability to reclaim the moving average indicates buyers have not yet regained control. Price action has also remained confined within a relatively narrow intraday range, pointing to a market that is consolidating after recent weakness.

The available momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. MACD currently stands at -0.0234, remaining below the neutral line and signaling that bearish momentum is still present. While the absence of a signal line limits confirmation strength, the negative MACD reading suggests downside pressure has not fully dissipated. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess overbought or oversold conditions, so greater emphasis should be placed on trend structure and price behavior around key technical levels.

From a support and resistance perspective, immediate support is located near the session low of 8.7900. A sustained break below this area could expose additional downside toward the 8.65-8.70 region. On the upside, initial resistance appears near the SMA(20) at 8.9157, followed by a stronger barrier around 9.00. A decisive move above these levels would improve sentiment and potentially signal the beginning of a broader recovery phase.

Traders may consider maintaining a defensive stance while price remains below the 20-period moving average. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above 8.92-9.00 before considering bullish positions. More aggressive traders may look for short-term range opportunities between support and resistance, while keeping tight risk controls. A close below 8.79 would strengthen the bearish case, whereas a sustained move above 9.00 would shift momentum in favor of buyers and improve the near-term technical outlook.
